name: Landing page renders hero section with CTA buttons and dashboard preview
description: The landing page at firstissue.dev loads with a hero headline, two CTA buttons (Join the movement, Explore issues), a trusted-by logos section, and a dashboard preview inside a browser-chrome frame.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://firstissue.dev

Verify the hero section displays a heading containing 'first contribution' and a subheading mentioning 'premium platform', with two CTA buttons visible below — one white filled button reading 'Join the movement' and one bordered button reading 'Explore issues'
Scroll down to the trusted-by section below the CTA buttons
Verify the trusted-by section shows company names including GitHub, Vercel, Supabase, Linear, and Prisma arranged horizontally with their icons
Scroll to the dashboard preview section containing a browser-chrome styled frame with window control dots

Verify a browser-chrome styled container is visible with three window control dots at the top-left and a URL bar showing 'firstissue.dev', containing a media element or image displaying the dashboard interface
